title: The End Update MC
description: The end update we have all been waiting for i didnt have time to make anything other then the enderite ores armor and tools no hoe ;(
body:
#     About This Mod
This mod adds the new enderite ore which only spawns in the end. It is very rare but also power full at the time of the update there is only enderite. Soon i will add a new entity and biome structures and maybe more.
